Job Title: Data Engineer (Azure & Microsoft Fabric) Work Location: Infopark, Kochi Experience Required: 4 to 5 Years Employment Type: Full-Time, Permanent Work Mode: Onsite, Hybrid Shift: Regular Shift

Company Description: SparkSupport Infotech Pvt Ltd, a leading IT solutions provider based in India, has joined forces with Tible, Netherlands, in a strategic joint venture to enhance our service offerings and expand our global footprint. For over 24 years, SparkSupport has been a trusted offshore technology partner for businesses in the UAE, UK, US, Netherlands, Canada, and other regions. We specialize in delivering scalable web and mobile applications, end-to-end cloud computing solutions, DevOps, data analytics, and Power Platform services. At SparkSupport, you will be part of a passionate team committed to solving tough technology challenges with innovative solutions, strengthened by our global partnership.

Role Description: We are seeking a highly skilled Data Engineer (Azure & Microsoft Fabric) with 4–5 years of experience in building scalable and efficient data engineering solutions using Microsoft Azure and Microsoft Fabric technologies. The ideal candidate should have strong expertise in ETL/ELT development, Azure Data Factory, Microsoft Fabric, advanced SQL, Data Lake architecture, and enterprise data pipeline orchestration. The role involves designing and implementing modern cloud-based data platforms, building robust ingestion frameworks including watermark/incremental loading, and enabling analytics and reporting solutions across the organization.

Key Responsibilities: - Design, develop, and maintain scalable ETL/ELT pipelines using Microsoft Azure services and Microsoft Fabric. - Implement watermark-based, incremental loading, and CDC (Change Data Capture) mechanisms for optimized data ingestion and processing. - Develop and orchestrate end-to-end data workflows using Microsoft Azure Data Factory (ADF) and Fabric Pipelines. - Build and manage enterprise-scale data pipelines for structured, semi-structured, and unstructured data. - Design and implement Lakehouse and Data Warehouse solutions using Microsoft Fabric. - Work with OneLake architecture for centralized and governed enterprise data management. - Implement medallion architecture (Bronze, Silver, Gold layers) for scalable data transformation and analytics. - Develop and optimize Spark and SQL-based data transformations within Fabric environments. - Design, manage, and optimize Azure Data Lake solutions. - Write and optimize complex SQL queries, stored procedures, views, and performance tuning scripts. - Integrate data from multiple cloud and on-premise data sources. - Monitor, troubleshoot, and optimize pipeline execution, workload performance, and data quality. - Implement security, governance, lineage, and access controls across data platforms. - Collaborate with business analysts, BI developers, architects, and stakeholders to deliver data-driven solutions. - Support CI/CD implementation, Git integration, and deployment automation for data engineering projects.

Required Skills & Qualifications: Mandatory Skills: - Microsoft Azure & ETL - 4–5 years of experience in Data Engineering. - Strong hands-on experience in: ETL/ELT development using Azure technologies, Azure Data Factory (ADF), Azure Data Lake, Data pipeline orchestration, Advanced SQL programming. - Experience implementing: Watermark-based loading, Incremental data processing, CDC frameworks, Batch and near real-time data ingestion. - Strong understanding of: Data warehousing concepts, Data modeling, Data transformation frameworks, Performance optimization techniques.

Microsoft Fabric Skills: - Strong hands-on experience with: Fabric Data Factory, Fabric Lakehouse, Fabric Warehouse, OneLake, Fabric Pipelines, Dataflows Gen2, Fabric Notebooks. - Experience designing modern analytics and enterprise data solutions using Microsoft Fabric. - Strong understanding of: Medallion Architecture, Delta Tables, Parquet file formats, Data partitioning, Incremental processing, OneLake shortcuts. - Experience integrating: Power BI with Fabric Semantic Models, Azure services with Fabric ecosystem, SQL databases, APIs, and external data sources. - Experience optimizing Spark jobs and SQL transformations in Fabric environments.

Preferred Skills: - Experience with: PySpark, Python, Azure Synapse Analytics, Power BI, Git and CI/CD pipelines. - Knowledge of: Fabric administration and tenant settings, Workspace security and governance, Row-Level Security (RLS), Data lineage and monitoring, Agile/Scrum methodologies.

Educational Qualification: - Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or related field.

Soft Skills: - Strong analytical and problem-solving skills. - Excellent communication and stakeholder management abilities. - Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment. - Strong attention to detail and commitment to data quality and governance.

Nice to Have: - Microsoft Azure or Microsoft Fabric certifications. - Experience working on enterprise-scale cloud data platforms. - Exposure to Real-Time Analytics/Eventstream capabilities in Microsoft Fabric.

Contact: If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at careers@sparksupport.com.

Collaboration and Communication - Partner with global engineering, platform, DevOps, and operations teams for AppSec initiatives. - Communicate findings, risks, and recommendations to developers/engineering managers. - Document triage decisions, exceptions, and remediation tracking for audit purposes. - Develop technical skills via mentorship, hands-on practice, and self-directed learning.

Preferred - Hands-on experience with AppSec tools (SAST, DAST, SCA, etc.). - Familiarity with threat modeling (STRIDE) and frameworks (OWASP ASVS, NIST SSDF). - Exposure to cloud-native security (containers, Kubernetes, serverless, IaC). - Awareness of AI/ML security risks and development practices. - Participation in CTFs, bug bounties, or open-source security projects. - Industry certifications (Security+, GIAC GFACT/GSEC, etc.). - Experience in regulated industries (financial services, healthcare).

job_description:
About Us

We are a premium, tech-agnostic software development agency focused on building tailored digital solutions for modern businesses. Rather than forcing clients into predefined technology stacks, we engineer scalable products using the best-fit technologies for each challenge — from cloud-native SaaS platforms and AI integrations to enterprise modernization and IoT solutions. We partner with startups, enterprises, and product teams to solve complex business problems through clean architecture, scalable engineering, and strategic technology consulting.

Job Overview

As our SEO & Digital Marketing Specialist, you will own the end-to-end digital marketing funnel. You won't just be tracking "clicks"—you will be building a cohesive engine that connects organic discovery to pipeline growth. Because we are tech-agnostic, your primary challenge will be positioning our brand across a massive keyword landscape (ranging from Rust and Python to Node.js, AWS, Kubernetes, and cross-platform mobile dev). You will work closely with our executive team and technical subject matter experts (SMEs) to translate complex engineering capabilities into high-ranking content and high-converting campaigns.

Key Responsibilities

1. SEO & Content Strategy (60%)

  • Keyword & Intent Mapping: Research and identify high-value, high-intent B2B search terms across various technologies, development methodologies (Agile, DevOps), and industry verticals.
  • Technical SEO: Conduct regular site audits, improve core web vitals, manage internal linking, optimize site architecture, and ensure search engines can seamlessly crawl our case studies and service pages.
  • On-Page & Semantic SEO: Optimize existing service pages and collaborate with writers to create new content that satisfies modern search intent (e.g., entity-based SEO, clustering, addressing user pain points).
  • SME Collaboration: Interview our software architects and developers to turn technical insights into authoritative, high-ranking blog posts, whitepapers, and case studies.

2. Digital Marketing & Lead Generation (30%)

  • Paid Campaigns (PPC): Set up, manage, and optimize targeted paid acquisition campaigns across LinkedIn Ads and Google Ads to capture buyers looking for software development partners.
  • Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO): Run A/B tests on landing pages, optimize CTA placement, and continuously improve the user journey from "reader" to "inbound lead."
  • Email & Nurture Campaigns: Maintain our newsletter and build automated email drip campaigns to nurture leads who download our technical guides or request project estimates.

3. Analytics & Reporting (10%)

  • Full-Funnel Tracking: Monitor performance metrics using Google Analytics 4 (GA4), Google Search Console, Hubspot/CRM, and SEO platforms (Ahrefs/Semrush).
  • ROI Reporting: Look beyond surface-level traffic metrics to track and report on pipeline contribution, Cost Per Lead (CPL), and Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC).

Required Skills & Qualifications

  • Experience: 3–5+ years of proven digital marketing and SEO experience, specifically within the B2B software, agency, or IT professional services sectors.
  • Technical Literacy: You don't need to write code, but you must know the difference between frontend and backend, SQL and NoSQL, monolithic and microservices. You must feel comfortable talking about diverse tech stacks.
  • SEO Toolkit: Mastery of tools like Ahrefs, Semrush, Screaming Frog, Google Search Console, and GA4.
  • Copywriting/Editing Sensibility: Strong capability to edit AI-generated or developer-written drafts into polished, engaging, SEO-optimized copy.
  • Growth Mindset: A proactive "test-and-learn" approach to marketing channels.

Preferred Skills

  • Familiarity with marketing automation platforms (e.g., HubSpot, HubSpot CMS, or WordPress).
  • Basic understanding of HTML/CSS/JS limitations regarding technical SEO.
  • Experience marketing software agencies that explicitly compete against offshore "code factories" by leading with consultative engineering value.

What We Offer

  • Competitive salary and performance-based bonuses tied to lead generation.
  • Flexible working hours and [Remote/Hybrid] setup.
  • Learning and development budget to keep your marketing edge sharp.
  • A collaborative environment devoid of corporate bureaucracy where your ideas directly impact company growth.

To Apply

Please submit your resume along with 2–3 examples of SEO campaigns or content strategies you've executed that resulted in verifiable B2B lead generation or organic traffic growth.

Contact Email: careers@xminds.com Closing Date: 30, June 2026
summary: Lead end-to-end SEO and digital marketing for a tech-agnostic software agency, focusing on B2B lead generation and content strategy across diverse tech stacks.

  • Research, experiment, and contribute to emerging AI areas (Agentic AI, autonomous workflows, next-gen GenAI frameworks)

  • Strong hands-on experience in Generative AI and Classical Machine Learning project implementations
  • Strong proficiency in Python and AI/ML libraries (TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn)
  • Proven experience with Generative AI, LLMs, Prompt Engineering, RAG, embeddings, and conversational AI systems
  • Strong understanding of supervised/unsupervised ML concepts, feature engineering, model evaluation, optimization, and predictive modeling
  • Experience in building and managing data pipelines, ML workflows, and MLOps practices
  • Hands-on experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) for AI solution deployment
  • Experience with API integrations, model serving, vector databases, and AI system integration
  • Strong analytical, problem-solving, and debugging skills
  • Excellent communication and stakeholder collaboration skills in a fast-paced environment

Preferred Qualifications

  • Exposure to model fine-tuning, multi-agent systems, and advanced GenAI architectures

job_description:

Location: Padmanabham, Technopark Campus, Trivandrum, 695581 Website: http://www.devicedriven.com Closing Date: 15, June 2026 Published Date: 21, May 2026 Contact Email: jobs@devicedriven.com

Senior System Administrator

Experience Required: 10–15+ years

About the Opportunity

We are seeking a highly experienced Senior System Administrator to join our Infrastructure / Site Reliability Engineering team. This role is critical to ensuring the stability, security, and operational excellence of enterprise infrastructure spanning cloud platforms, Windows and Linux systems, identity services, networking, and security tooling. The ideal candidate is a hands-on senior individual contributor who can independently own infrastructure domains, lead complex maintenance activities, and act as an escalation point during production incidents.

Role Overview

As a Senior System Administrator, you will: - Own day-to-day reliability and lifecycle management of enterprise infrastructure - Lead patching, maintenance, and security remediation initiatives - Act as a senior escalation point for incidents and operational issues - Ensure compliance with security, audit, and change management processes - Partner closely with SRE, DevOps, Security, Database, and Application teams - Drive operational discipline, documentation, and best practices

Key Responsibilities

  1. Infrastructure Maintenance & Lifecycle Management
  2. Plan and execute regular infrastructure maintenance and patching cycles
  3. Coordinate system updates, service restarts, and reboots with minimal impact
  4. Perform pre- and post-maintenance validation and reporting
  5. Support infrastructure upgrades, migrations, and decommissioning

  6. Participate in capacity planning and resource optimization

  7. Security, Patching & Vulnerability Remediation

  8. Own remediation of infrastructure vulnerabilities identified by scanning tools
  9. Prioritize and resolve Critical, High, and Medium severity findings within SLAs
  10. Apply security patches to operating systems and core infrastructure components
  11. Partner with security teams on compliance, audits, and remediation tracking

  12. Implement hardening best practices across servers and services

  13. Cloud & Core Infrastructure Administration

  14. Administer cloud-based compute, networking, storage, and IAM services
  15. Manage firewall rules, routing, and secure connectivity
  16. Configure and troubleshoot storage and file system integrations
  17. Build, configure, and maintain virtual machines and system services

  18. Support hybrid environments spanning on-premise and cloud systems

  19. Identity, Access & Certificate Management

  20. Manage enterprise identity and access systems (directory services, SSO, MFA)
  21. Handle access provisioning, role management, and authentication issues
  22. Own certificate lifecycle management (generation, renewal, deployment)
  23. Validate certificate chains, keystores, and encryption standards

  24. Prevent certificate-related outages through proactive monitoring

  25. Incident Response, Troubleshooting & Reliability

  26. Respond to infrastructure alerts and production incidents
  27. Perform deep troubleshooting across OS, network, storage, and services
  28. Lead root cause analysis and implement preventive measures
  29. Improve monitoring, alerting, and operational runbooks
  30. Act as a senior escalation point during major incidents

Required Skills & Qualifications

Experience: - 10–15+ years of experience in System Administration, Infrastructure Engineering, or SRE roles - Proven experience supporting enterprise, production-critical environments - Strong background in operations, reliability, and incident management

Core Technical Skills: - Operating Systems: Deep expertise in Windows Server administration; Strong hands-on experience with Linux (RHEL/CentOS or equivalent) - Cloud Infrastructure: Experience administering cloud compute, networking, storage, and IAM; Strong understanding of cloud security and operational best practices - Security & Compliance: Experience with vulnerability management and remediation workflows; Understanding of infrastructure hardening and compliance standards - Certificates & Identity: SSL/TLS certificate lifecycle management; Enterprise directory services, SSO, and MFA systems - Automation & Scripting: Proficiency in PowerShell, Bash, and/or Python for automation

Process & Operational Discipline: - Strong experience with ITIL-based change management - Comfortable authoring change plans, rollback procedures, and documentation - Experience working with ticketing and workflow tools - Familiarity with monitoring, alerting, and incident tracking systems

Preferred Skills

  • Cloud or infrastructure certifications (vendor-agnostic or cloud-specific)
  • Experience with endpoint management or configuration management tools
  • Exposure to container platforms and orchestration (Kubernetes or equivalent)
  • Experience with Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, ARM, etc.)
  • Familiarity with mail systems and relay configurations
summary: Senior System Administrator with 10–15+ years experience managing enterprise infrastructure, cloud environments, and security. Oversees maintenance, incident response, and compliance across hybrid systems.
